title: Cross-Dataset JRN Consolidation: Probe Validity, Join-Selector Diagnostic, and Paper-Ready Tables
summary: Demo notebook consolidating JRN evaluation across 4 RelBench datasets. Demonstrates Fisher z meta-analytic probe validity (weighted rho=0.876), JRN as binary join selector (ROC-AUC with bootstrap CI), aggregation sensitivity reanalysis, JRN distribution analysis with KDE modes, multiplicative compounding (R²=0.828), and hypothesis scorecard. Includes 4-panel visualization: forest plot, distribution histogram, compounding scatter, and scorecard heatmap. Uses 118 curated examples from the full evaluation output.
